title: sitanywhere
description: Adds sitting, lying and crawling animations to your Minecraft server. Players can sit on blocks with right-click, lie down with Shift + right-click, and crawl using commands.
body:
🎯 SitAnywhere Plugin
Version: 1.0.1

📝 Description:
"A plugin that adds a system of animations: sitting, lying, and crawling on any blocks and surfaces."

⚡ Key Features:
✅ Sit on any block – Right-click on a block

✅ Lie down on blocks – Shift + Right-click on a block

✅ Crawl on the ground – Dedicated command

✅ Auto-stand – Triggered by movement or jumping

✅ Three animation modes – Sitting, lying, crawling

🎮 Commands:
/sit – Sit at your current location

/lay – Lie down at your current location

/crawl – Start crawling

/sit reload – Reload the configuration

🖱️ Controls:
SIT: Right-click on a block

LIE DOWN: Shift + Right-click on a block

CRAWL: Use the /crawl command

🔧 Technical Details:
Compatibility: Spigot/Paper 1.16+

Dependencies: None

Configuration: Customizable messages, permissions, animations

🌟 Highlights:
Three unique pose animations

Intuitive controls

Realistic animations

Supports all block types

Optimized performance

Perfect for RP servers, streaming, and creating a unique in-game atmosphere! 🛋️💤🐍
